title: Nahalal #5096
definition:
Nahalal or Nahallal or Nahalol = "pasture"

 1) one of the cities of Zebulun given to the Merarite Levites
    1a) site uncertain
    1b) maybe modern 'Malul', a village in the plain of Esdraelon
